# seerr_user_permissions (Resource)

Manage Seerr user permissions via /api/v1/user/{userId}.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "seerr_user_permissions" "admin" {
  user_id     = 1
  permissions = 1048575
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `permissions` (Number) Numeric permissions bitmask for the user.
- `user_id` (Number) The numeric ID of the user whose permissions to manage.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response body from the latest operation.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code from the latest operation.
